name: Roquefort Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces canned anchovy fillets, drained and chopped
whole pimiento sliced in thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop yolks and whites of hard cooked eggs separately.
2. Prepare the pie crust as directed on the package. Roll out dough to a 9-inch circle. Place on a baking sheet. Flute the edges, prick the bottom, and bake as directed. Allow to cool.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the cheeses and blend thoroughly. Spread the cheese mixture evenly on the pastry circle.
4. Place the chopped anchovies in the center of the pie.
5. Around the center, create concentric circles of chopped egg yolks, green pepper, chopped egg whites, and olive slices.
6. Finally, rim the pie with pimiento strips.
7. Refrigerate until firm. To serve, slice into wedges. Yield: 10 to 12 wedges.
